subject_output:
```yaml
# Level: fault_lines_07_the_chasm
# Region: fault_lines
# Tier: 3
# Description: A vertical descent through a fault line shaft with narrow ledges and platforms

name: "The Chasm"
region: fault_lines
tier: 3
description: "Descend through the fault lines, navigating narrow ledges and platforms. The ember dims when you hesitate - keep moving to see clearly."

# Player start position
start:
  x: 100
  y: 50

# Checkpoints (natural descent path)
checkpoints:
  - x: 100
    y: 200
  - x: 100
    y: 400

# Platforms and obstacles
platforms:
  # Initial platform at start
  - type: static
    x: 90
    y: 80
    width: 20
    height: 10
  
  # First descent platform
  - type: static
    x: 120
    y: 150
    width: 30
    height: 10
    rotation: 0
  
  # Narrow ledge
  - type: static
    x: 85
    y: 220
    width: 15
    height: 10
    rotation: 0
  
  # Second descent platform
  - type: static
    x: 130
    y: 280
    width: 25
    height: 10
    rotation: 0
  
  # Narrow ledge
  - type: static
    x: 90
    y: 340
    width: 10
    height: 10
    rotation: 0
  
  # Third descent platform
  - type: static
    x: 125
    y: 420
    width: 30
    height: 10
    rotation: 0
  
  # Final platform before exit
  - type: static
    x: 100
    y: 480
    width: 20
    height: 10
    rotation: 0

# Ember pickups (total value: ~8 ember)
ember_pickups:
  - x: 115
    y: 130
  - x: 95
    y: 240
  - x: 105
    y: 370
  - x: 120
    y: 460

# Exit point
exit:
  x: 110
  y: 520

# Lethal zones (void/lava at bottom)
lethal_zones:
  - type: lava
    x: 0
    y: 540
    width: 200
    height: 60

# Background elements for visual context
background_elements:
  - type: wall
    x: 0
    y: 0
    width: 10
    height: 600
  - type: wall
    x: 190
    y: 0
    width: 10
    height: 600

# Level boundaries (optional but good for clarity)
boundaries:
  left: 0
  right: 200
  top: 0
  bottom: 600

# Metadata
metadata:
  estimated_time: "3 minutes"
  difficulty: "Medium-High"
  commit_message: "Added fault_lines_07_the_chasm level"
```
